geo.headline: Shop Salvya in your region?
geo.pricingMorocco: Morocco pricing in MAD. Change country to view international rates.
geo.pricingInternational: International catalog pricing. Select Morocco for local MAD prices.
geo.currencyHint: Updates the currency symbol only. Product prices follow your selected country unless Morocco is chosen.
geo.detectedUnknown: Location unavailable — choose your country below.
geo.chargeNote: Checkout is processed in EUR. Displayed prices reflect your selected region.
geo.moroccoStorefrontHint: Morocco store · Prices in Moroccan dirham (MAD) · Delivery available in Morocco
geo.mismatchToast: Your connection suggests {detected}. Prices remain set for {selected}.

menu.guestSubtitle: Sign in for orders, likes, and a faster checkout.
menu.guestDiscoverSubtitle: Discover limited drops, follow creators, and shop premium merch — all in one place.
menu.helpPoliciesSubtitle: Tap a section to expand shipping, returns, terms, and support.
menu.shoppingCardSubtitle: Drops, bag, sizing, and order tracking.
menu.aboutBody: Fashion-tech for creators — limited drops, premium merch, and a community that moves culture forward.

bag.title: Your bag
bag.introGuest: Items you add from product pages. Sign in to save your bag to your Salvya account and use it on any device.
bag.introSignedIn: Items you added from product pages — saved on this device. Sign in with cloud sync enabled to keep your bag across devices.
bag.introSynced: Items you added from product pages — saved to your Salvya account and this device. Open checkout when you are ready; nothing is reserved until you complete your order.
bag.emptyHint: On any piece, pick size and color, tap {addVariant}, then add another size or color before checkout.
bag.footerStatus: {badge} · {variants, plural, one {# variant} other {# variants}} · {pieces, plural, one {# piece} other {# pieces}}
bag.multiCheckoutNote: One checkout walks through each variant in order.
bag.checkoutCta: Checkout · {count, plural, one {# variant} other {# variants}}
bag.checkoutSecureNote: Secure Salvya checkout for everything in your bag.

trackOrder.title: Track your shipment
trackOrder.description: Look up your Salvya order with your order number and the email used at checkout.
trackOrder.notFound: We could not find an order with those details. Check the number and email, then try again.
trackOrder.signInPrompt: Signed in? View all orders in your account.
trackOrder.descriptionLong: Look up real Salvya orders with your SVY number and checkout email. Status reflects our warehouse — carrier scans appear when partners are connected.
trackOrder.helpInbox: Can't find your number? Check your confirmation email or {signIn} to see all orders.

errors.email: Enter the email address used at checkout.

auth.signInDescription: Log in to your Salvya account to manage orders and saved details.
auth.createAccountDescription: Create a Salvya account to save your details, track orders, and shop artist merch faster.
auth.signInCardSubtitle: Sign in with Google or your email. Your bag and likes sync when you return.
auth.createAccountCardSubtitle: Fastest with Google, or create a password. One profile for checkout and your bag.
auth.rememberMeHint: Stay signed in on this device until you sign out.
auth.supabaseNotConfigured: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
auth.clientStartFailed: Could not start sign-in. Refresh and try again.
auth.confirmEmailPrompt: Confirm your email to sign in.
auth.accountDeactivated: This account has been deactivated. Contact support if you need help.
auth.emailLinkIncomplete: Email link was incomplete. Request a new sign-in or confirmation email.
auth.accountReadyBanner: Your account is ready. Check your inbox for a confirmation email if required, then sign in below.
auth.resendCheckInbox: Check your inbox — we sent another confirmation link.
auth.creatorsFooter: Creators — use the same login. Your creator workspace unlocks after approval.
auth.registerBenefit: Faster checkout on this device — bag, orders, and saved addresses.
auth.countryHint: Used for shipping estimates and regional pricing.
auth.termsAccept: I accept the Terms of Service and Account creation addendum
auth.existingEmailTitle: This email already has an account
auth.passwordMismatchForm: Passwords do not match. Check both fields and try again.
auth.passwordMinForm: Use at least 8 characters for your password.
auth.termsRequired: Please accept the Terms of Service and Account addendum to create your account.
auth.countryRequired: Choose your country or region so we can show the right shipping options.
auth.forgotHeroTitle: Get back into your Salvya account.
auth.resetEmailBody: If an account exists for this email, we sent a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSteps: Open the email · tap Reset password · choose a new password
auth.updateIntro: Choose a strong password you have not used on Salvya before.
auth.supabaseServerNotConfigured: Sign-in is not configured on the server. Add keys to salvya.local.env or .env.local.
auth.supabaseEnvHint: Sign-in is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to salvya.local.env (see .env.example), restart dev, then try again.

checkout.paypalVerifyNote: We confirm amount and capture with PayPal before your order is marked paid. This usually takes a few seconds.
checkout.codNote: Cash on delivery — pay the courier when your parcel arrives.
checkout.paidNote: Payment verified with PayPal. We will email you when your order ships.
checkout.soldOutClosed: This item is sold out — checkout is closed for now.
checkout.introShipping: Tell us where to send your {kind}. Morocco: cash on delivery or PayPal. International: PayPal only.
checkout.cardsViaPayPal: Cards are processed securely through PayPal.
checkout.internationalNote: International order — cash on delivery is not available outside Morocco.
checkout.moroccoPaymentNote: Morocco — delivery and payment at the next step (cash on delivery or PayPal).
checkout.savedAddressHint: Ship to an address from your Salvya account.
checkout.manualAddressHint: Type a one-off address for this order only.
checkout.noSavedAddresses: No saved addresses yet. Add one in Account settings, or enter a new address below.
checkout.contactSubtitle: We use this to confirm your order and send updates.
checkout.deliverySubtitle: Country defines available payment methods and delivery options.
checkout.streetPlaceholderMa: Quarter, street, building, floor — as precise as possible
checkout.editAddressHint: Need to edit this address? Switch to « New address for this order ».
checkout.previewNoCharge: Preview checkout — no charge yet until you confirm on the last step.
checkout.deliveryHintMorocco: Morocco · typical delivery 2–5 business days after confirmation.
checkout.deliveryHintIntl: International · express tracked shipping — timelines shown at payment.
checkout.paymentIntroMorocco: Morocco: choose cash on delivery or pay with PayPal (card via PayPal).
checkout.paymentIntroIntl: Your address is outside Morocco — PayPal only (card or PayPal balance).
checkout.cardsNotStored: Card details are processed by PayPal — Salvya never stores your card.
checkout.intlShippingNote: International shipping — COD only available in Morocco.
checkout.payCardDesc: Visa, Mastercard, Amex via PayPal — no PayPal account required.
checkout.payCodDesc: Pay the courier in MAD when your parcel arrives.
checkout.completePayPalFirst: Complete PayPal payment above to continue.
checkout.completePayPalHint: Use the PayPal button above — we will unlock the next step when payment is received.
checkout.paymentCancelled: Payment cancelled — tap PayPal when you are ready.
checkout.paypalReceived: PayPal payment received — you can continue to confirmation.
checkout.soldOutPayment: This item is sold out — payment and confirmation are unavailable.
checkout.paymentVerifyFailed: Payment could not be verified. Try again or choose another method.
checkout.confirmFailed: We could not confirm your order. Contact support if you were charged.
checkout.thankYouEmail: Thank you for ordering from {artist}. We will email you at {email} when your order ships.
checkout.bagEmptyError: Your bag is empty or could not be loaded.

errors.addressPath: Choose a saved address or enter a new one.
errors.storage: Could not load saved addresses. Try again or enter a new address.

account.noOrders: No orders on this account yet.
account.noOrdersGuest: Sign in to see orders linked to your account.
account.notificationsEmptyBody: Bag updates, likes, follows, and orders will appear here automatically.
account.hubIntro: Hub for orders, alerts, addresses, and your bag — everything in one place.
account.signInToSync: Sign in to sync orders, addresses, and notifications across devices.
account.saveFailed: Could not save your details. Try again.
account.addressDeleteConfirm: Remove this address from your account?
account.ordersGuestHint: Orders placed while signed in sync here. Guest checkouts — use your SVY number and email on track order.
account.addressesHint: Save shipping destinations once — pick them at checkout when signed in.
account.alertsHint: Orders, drops, and account messages when signed in.

shop.title: Shop official artist merch
shop.description: Browse limited-run hoodies, tees, and drops from artists on Salvya.

artist.officialShop: Official Salvya shop for this artist — same secure checkout as the rest of the store.

seo.defaultDescription: Official artist merch on Salvya: limited runs, premium streetwear, European shipping, and a mobile-first checkout built for fans.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Check your connection and try again.

orders.title: My orders
orders.subtitle: Invoice, tracking, and cancellation — tied to your Salvya account.
orders.cancelWindowClosed: The 24-hour cancellation window has passed for this order.
orders.loadFailed: Could not load this order. Try again.
orders.emptyActiveDesc: When you checkout while signed in, live orders show here with tracking and your invoice.
orders.emptyHistoryDesc: Completed and cancelled orders will appear here.
